description_long: This coupe car features a classic muscle car body with a raised suspension and oversized off-road tires, blending the aesthetics of a vintage Ford Mustang with the ruggedness of a monster truck. The front end displays a prominent grille, round headlights, and a hood scoop, while the body retains the iconic coupe silhouette with two doors and a hardtop roof. The side profile reveals pronounced fender flares, side steps, and large, deeply treaded wheels designed for off-road performance. The rear view shows a simple bumper and tail light arrangement, consistent with classic American muscle cars. The windows are framed and the car appears to have a robust metal chassis, with visible details such as door handles, mirrors, and windshield wipers. The overall finish is matte gray, with some yellow highlights on the front bumper and hood.
description: A classic muscle coupe car with a hardtop roof, oversized off-road tires, and a matte gray finish, blending vintage styling with rugged monster truck features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, round headlights, hood scoop, and yellow bumper highlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe profile, two doors, large off-road tires, and side steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the simple bumper, tail lights, and the wide stance of the off-road tires.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the hardtop roof, door, and rugged wheel setup.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
